author: codex-duplication-audit

patch.value: Deduplicate comments, notes, and learnings command stacks

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: jscpd found src/cli/commands/comments.ts, notes.ts, and learnings.ts repeat the same item lookup, add/list option handling, output shape, and mutation/history patterns. Representative clones include comments.ts:2-14 vs notes.ts:1-13, comments.ts:58-77 vs notes.ts:46-65, comments.ts:193-206 vs notes.ts:115-128, learnings.ts:1-15 vs notes.ts:1-15, learnings.ts:43-65 vs notes.ts:43-65, and learnings.ts:119-132 vs notes.ts:115-128. Search found closed implementation/parity work (pm-c465, pm-v1s1) but no active dedupe task. Fix by extracting a shared append/list annotation command factory for comments, notes, and learnings with resource-specific metadata/history labels.

comments/notes/learnings share one command core for item resolution, append/list modes, author/message handling, and output rendering; resource-specific behavior remains explicit through adapters; existing comments, notes, and learnings tests pass; pnpm build passes.

message: Create annotation command duplication finding after duplicate-check search
